calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jessica R. MacGregor, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Long & Levit LLP.
Jessica R. MacGregor, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined
No appearance by defendant Martin Resendez Guajardo.
Default was entered against defendant on December 7, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 5, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Long & Levit LLP billing statement to defendant dated 11/4/09------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Long & Levit LLP, and against the Defaulted Defendant Martin Resendez Guajardo as follows:

Damages/Principal - $115,380.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,691.00.
Costs - $440.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $141,511.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
